title: Sarepta Therapeutics Fourth Quarter and Full-Year 2024 Financial Results and Corporate Developments
text:
Sarepta Therapeutics announced fourth quarter and full-year 2024 financial results, highlighting record revenue growth and ELEVIDYS commercial success. Net product revenues were $638 million for Q4 2024, representing a 75% increase over Q4 2023. Full-year 2024 net product revenue: $1.8 billion, up 56% year-over-year.

ELEVIDYS Commercial Achievement: Fourth-quarter ELEVIDYS net product revenue: $384.2 million, representing 112% growth from prior sequential quarter. Full-year ELEVIDYS net product revenue exceeded $1 billion, achieved in approximately 18 months since initial approval. Current treatment penetration approximately 5% of on-label addressable patient population.

PMO Franchise Performance: Q4 2024 PMO combined net product revenues: $254 million. Individual product revenues: EXONDYS 51: $137.6 million, VYONDYS 53: $40.2 million, AMONDYS 45: $76.2 million. Full-year 2024 PMO franchise revenues: $967 million, demonstrating continued growth in the legacy RNA-based franchise.

2025 Revenue Guidance: Total net product revenue guidance: $2.9 billion to $3.1 billion. Expected breakdown: Approximately one-third from PMO franchise. Over two-thirds from ELEVIDYS. ELEVIDYS specifically projected to grow over 160% year-over-year in 2025.

Profitability and Cash Flow: Company achieved sustainable profitability on GAAP and non-GAAP bases. Positive operating cash flow generation reported. Company positioned to fund all pipeline programs internally with strong balance sheet.

Management Commentary: CEO Doug Ingram stated: In 2024, we had, by a wide margin, the most successful launch of a gene therapy yet in history.
